title: Cyclone DANA — Warning #12
description: Tropical cyclone DANA (Cat 2) tracking northwest across Bay of Bengal. Landfall expected near Odisha coast within 24 hours. Wind speeds 90-110 km/h. Storm surge 1.5-2.5m expected.

title: Brahmaputra River — Flood Alert
description: Water levels in Brahmaputra at Guwahati crossing danger mark. Moderate flooding expected in low-lying areas of Kamrup district for next 48 hours.

title: Tsunami Watch — Eastern Indian Ocean
description: M7.2 earthquake detected off Sumatra coast. Tsunami advisory issued for eastern Indian Ocean coastlines. Estimated wave arrival in 2-4 hours for Andaman & Nicobar.

title: Delhi NCR — Severe AQI Alert
description: Air quality index exceeding 400 (Severe+) across Delhi-NCR. PM2.5 levels critically high. GRAP Stage-IV restrictions in effect.

title: Uttarakhand Forest Fire Alert
description: Multiple active fire incidents detected in Uttarakhand forests. FIRMS satellite data shows 47 hotspots in Kumaon and Garhwal divisions. Fire danger rating: Extreme.

title: M5.8 Earthquake — Hindu Kush Region
description: Moderate earthquake (M5.8) at 180km depth in Hindu Kush region, Afghanistan. Felt across northern Pakistan and J&K. No tsunami threat.
